## Tough Tongue AI Launches

Tough Tongue AI for Sales [...] 17d ago

### Support for Bring Your Own Keys (BYOK) 🎉 🚀

You can now connect your own model provider keys and run practice on your own quota. Grab a free Gemini key from Google AI Studio, or use your existing OpenAI and other provider keys.   
 Why it matters: Most of you already have a key somewhere, free Gemini keys, company OpenAI accounts, unused credits. BYOK turns that into near-unlimited practice here. You can also orchestrate Anam and other avatar providers through the platform.  
How to start:   
1. Open Settings:   
2. Add your provider key (Gemini or OpenAI)  
3. Select the provider on your scenario and start practicing  
Questions? Drop them here.
